overview: Bikaner Sweets is a colorful and festive showcase website for a traditional Indian sweet shop. All content is in Hindi, featuring a hero banner, product gallery with 6 Indian sweets, About section, Special Offers, and a Contact form — all styled with a warm saffron, red, yellow, and gold palette.
features: Hero banner with 'हर खुशी में मिठास' text and smooth animations
6 product cards (लड्डू, बर्फी, रसगुल्ला, जलेबी, काजू कतली, गुलाब जामुन) with images
Special Offers section with festive styling
Contact form with Hindi labels and validation
